project.name: HACD Agent Identity Demo
project.description: A demo Stack Asset showing how an AI agent can use HACD as a PoW-backed identity container.

asset.utility_summary: Each Stack lot represents an AI identity asset state formed inside one HACD.

copy.headline: AI identity, formed through HACD.

copy.short_description: AID is a HACD Stack Asset demo for AI agent identity and state formation.

notes: Demo only. Final launch parameters require HACD Labs review.
